name: App多区价格查询
description: Search App Store apps and compare prices across multiple regions. Shows version info, release notes, and description with automatic Chinese translation.

localizedDescriptions.en: Search apps and compare prices across multiple App Store regions with auto CNY conversion. View version info, release notes, and descriptions — auto-translated to Chinese when needed. Customizable regions and currencies.
localizedDescriptions.zh: 搜索 App 并对比多区价格（自动换算人民币）。展示版本信息、更新说明与简介（按需翻译为中文）。支持自定义地区与汇率，单区失败不影响其它区。
